name: Flannel Baby Blankets Floral Fields 4pk - Cloud Island™
description:
They're sure to stay cozy when you have the 4-Pack Flannel Baby Blankets Floral Fields from cloud island™ on hand. Featuring four different patterns — two with flowers, one heart patterned and one striped — these printed baby blankets coordinate with a variety of themes and instantly brighten your nursery decor. Made from cotton fabric, these baby blankets feel soft against their tender skin, and the larger size makes them perfect for baby during tummy time, stroller rides or any other time they need a little comfort.

We made it better so you can feel better. To keep you safe from harmful substances, this product has been independently tested and certified against a list of over 350 harmful chemicals according to strict STANDARD 100 by OEKO-TEX® guidelines.
